/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/eqdatetime.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libeqdatetime.so -o libeqdatetime.so CMakeFiles/eqdatetime.dir/eqdatetime_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/eqdatetime.dir/eqdatetime.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
